name: 4th Menu: Fourth of July Feast on the Grill
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all skewers with shrimp and cherry tomatoes the night before. Refrigerate.
2. Make the chickpea and carrot salad ahead of time and refrigerate.
3. Prepare the bell pepper sauce for salmon in advance and refrigerate.
4. Preheat the grill and prepare potato wedges by scrubbing, parboiling, and refrigerating.
5. Grill shrimp appetizers first; serve while hot.
6. Place potato wedges on the grill to cook with shrimp.
7. Add salmon steaks to the grill once potatoes are done.
8. Serve salad alongside dishes as they finish cooking. Enjoy!
